song.title: We Believe
song.lyrics:
[V1] . Intro: G Gsus x 2 . G Gsus4 G In this time of desperation . Gsus4 Em When all we know is doubt and fear . C There is only One Salvation . G Gsus4 We believe, We believe . G Gsus4 G In this broken generation . Gsus4 Em When all is dark, You help us see . C There is only One Foundation . G Gsus4 We believe, We believe [C] CHORUS . G D We believe in God the Father, We believe in Jesus Christ . Em C We believe in the Holy Spirit, And He's given us new life . G D We believe in the crucifixion, We believe that He conquered death . Em C We believe in the resurrection, And He's comin' back again . G Gsus4 we believe -!! -!!
[V2] . G Gsus4 G So, let our faith be more than anthems . Gsus4 Em Greater than the songs we sing . C And in our weakness and temptations . G Gsus4 We believe, We believe! [B] . C D Let the lost be found and the dead be raised! . Em Bm In the here and now, let love invade! . C D Let the church live loud, our God will say . Em Bm We believe, We believe! . C D And the gates of hell will not prevail! . Em Bm For the power of God, has torn the veil! . C D Now we know Your love will never fail! . Em Bm We believe, We believe!
[E] . G D He's comin' back again! . Em He's comin' back again! . C We believe! . C <== Dlternativley And in G We believe
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
